response.justification: Strong generalist with 13+ years of polyglot full-stack experience, current TypeScript/Node work, and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited depth in production GenAI delivery: no explicit RAG, vector database, multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI), or LLM evaluation/observability experience, and minimal evidence of Python or major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) AI system design at the scale a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role demands. Worth a screening conversation to probe the depth of the recent AI work.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production systems across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at high scale
Current hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background plus demonstrated technical leadership, mentoring, and public speaking
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience listed
Python is absent from the skills list; role requires 8+ years of AI development in Python or TypeScript
Limited evidence of major cloud platform AI architecture (AWS CDK mentioned, but no GCP/Azure or large-scale AI cloud deployments)

key_factors.factor: Missing core GenAI stack (RAG, vector DBs, multi-agent frameworks)
Current MCP and agentic workflow work at re:cinq
No Python listed despite 8+ year AI development requirement
